title: St33l-Blocks & Drills
description:
This Mod adds 8 new craftable blocks and a steel_ingot.
Craftable Blocks:
Steel_Block, Reinforced_Steel_Block, Steel_Girdle, Steel_Casing, Steel_Lamp, Green_Steel_Lamp, Red_Steel_Lamp, Purple_Steel_Lamp
Mod Preview:
https://youtu.be/UpvprLGAPqM
body:
This mod adds 8 new building blocks Steel block, Reinforced Steel Block, Steel Girdle, Steel Casing, Steel Lamp, Red Steel Lamp, Green Steel Lamp, Purple Steel Lamp and their recipies that are craftable in survival.
Mod Preview:
https://youtu.be/UpvprLGAPqM

Github:
https://github.com/JCT-B/justamodforhackcraftv2
